description: Bring festive cheer to any Christmas celebration with these fun and colourful Christmas Headbands, designed for adults, teens and kids who want an easy way to elevate their holiday look. The glowing elements of the Light Up Christmas Headband make every moment feel brighter and more joyful. Core Benefits Festive shapes and colours add instant Christmas charm LED lights create a standout effect for parties and photos Soft, durable materials ensure comfortable all-day wear Suitable for family gatherings, school events and office parties Ideal as a small seasonal gift or group accessory Package Include 6 × assorted LED Christmas Headbands How To Use Simply place the headband over your hair and switch on the LED lights for an instant festive glow. Precautions Avoid bending the frame; keep away from water; not suitable for very young children due to small decorative parts.
